content.extracted_text:
Kepada Tuan Pengarah,

Dengan hormatnya saya ingin memaklumkan bahawa dokumen ini telah dihantar pada tahun 1940 bagi tujuan rekod rasmi jabatan. Sila ambil perhatian bahawa semua maklumat di dalam surat ini adalah sulit dan hanya untuk kegunaan dalaman sahaja.

Sekian, terima kasih.

Hormat saya,
Encik Ahmad bin Ismail

audit_trail.name: Grayscale Conversion
audit_trail.description: Converted original colour image to grayscale to reduce noise and prepare for thresholding.

audit_trail.name: Denoising
audit_trail.description: Applied Gaussian blur to remove salt-and-pepper noise caused by paper degradation.

audit_trail.name: Contrast Enhancement
audit_trail.description: Applied CLAHE (Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization) to improve text legibility.

audit_trail.name: Binarization
audit_trail.description: Applied Otsu thresholding to separate text from background for cleaner OCR input.

audit_trail.name: OCR Extraction
audit_trail.description: Ran Tesseract OCR on the enhanced image to extract machine-readable text.

audit_trail.name: Layout Analysis
audit_trail.description: Detected bounding boxes for text regions, headers, and paragraphs using contour detection.
